hero.badge: 35+ Years of Selfless Service & Proud Heritage
hero.title: Shri Jalaram Raghuvanshi Lohana Kanya Chatralay
hero.subtitle: A sacred home for safety, cultural values, and all-round development of girls. We have been working for the bright future of Lohana daughters since 1988.

about.title: About Shri Jalaram Raghuvanshi Lohana Kanya Chatralay
about.description: Our organization is dedicated to providing high-quality education and a secure residential environment for Lohana community girls. With the blessings of Pujya Jalaram Bapa and the noble values of Raghuvanshi heritage, we strive to make girls independent and cultivate moral values.
about.feature1Desc: Guidance for a bright career path

facilities.title: Our Modern Facilities
facilities.subtitle: We provide more than just lodging; we offer an environment conducive to the overall growth of our girls.

bed.title: Lodging Facility
bed.description: Well-ventilated, clean, and highly secure living quarters.

restaurant.title: Nutritious Food
restaurant.description: Pure vegetarian, home-style delicious and healthy meals.

library.title: Study Room
library.description: Peaceful atmosphere and well-equipped library facilities.

temple.title: Prayer Hall
temple.description: Daily prayers, peaceful spiritual activities, and assemblies.

health.title: Medical Checks
health.description: Regular health checkups and complete first-aid facilities.

cctv.title: CCTV Security
cctv.description: 24-hour security guards and comprehensive CCTV monitoring.

sports.title: Sports & Play
sports.description: Playground and equipment for physical health and activities.

hotTub.title: Hot Water
hotTub.description: Eco-friendly solar water heating system across campus.

admission.title: Admission Process
admission.subtitle: Begin your daughter's bright future in 3 simple steps.

step1.title: Obtain Form
step1.description: Download the form online from our website or obtain it from the trust office.

step2.title: Submit Documents
step2.description: Submit the completed form along with required academic and ID documents to the office.

step3.title: Interview & Admission
step3.description: Admission will be confirmed on merit after a brief interaction with the trustees.

trustee1.name: Shri Mansukhbhai Raghavji
trustee1.description: Over 40 years of social service experience and the founding pillar of the organization.

trustee2.name: Shri Hareshbhai Lohana
trustee2.description: An education enthusiast and a leading personality in social reforms.

trustee3.name: Smt. Jyotsnaben Pandya
trustee3.description: Pioneering work in women empowerment and girls' education.

trustee4.name: Shri Ashokbhai Mehta
trustee4.description: Driving force behind the administration and modernization of the trust.

q1.q: 1. What is the age limit for admission?
q1.a: Our organization generally admits girls studying from Grade 5 up to College level.

q2.q: 2. Is there any fee charged for the hostel?
q2.a: Since our trust is run by the Raghuvanshi Lohana community, lodging and boarding are completely free of charge for Lohana girls.

q3.q: 3. What security measures are in place?
q3.a: Safety is our top priority. We provide 24-hour female guards, CCTV monitoring, and biometric attendance.
